subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! Thy grace hath seized me, and Thy mercy hath encompassed me, and Thy generosity hath sustained me, and Thy hosts have rendered me victorious, and Thy love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی فضلک اخذنی و رحمتک احاطتنی و جودک اعاننی و جنودک نصرتنی و عشقک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
